title: Spicy Ukrainian Bake
description: A spicy twist on traditional Ukrainian bake with a hint of Indian cuisine. This dish is perfect for those who enjoy spicy food.

ingredients.name: Spicy ukrainian sausage
ingredients.notes: Make sure to handle sausage safely

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the cubed bread, shredded cheese, sliced sausage, cumin, bake spice, salt, and black pepper. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Add the softened butter to the bread mixture and mix until the bread is well coated.
Transfer the bread mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
